name: G.R JOHNSON LAW, LLC
address: 135 NW GREELEY AVE STE 1, BEND, OR 97703

fr.recommendations: Streamlining emergency response to the property could benefit from addressing the challenges of a single access point and limited rear access. Installing a secondary access point may enhance entry and exit flows for emergency vehicles, thus reducing response times. Ensuring that the vehicle parking area and pedestrian walkways remain free from blockages can facilitate smoother navigation and maneuverability for emergency responders. Trimming or selectively removing sections of the dense vegetation could improve visibility and allow for more efficient operations around the property perimeter. Additionally, considering strategically placed gaps in the perimeter fencing may support quicker responder staging and access to various areas of the property.

wildfire.recommendations: Enhancing defensible space by increasing the separation between vegetation and the structure could improve property resilience to wildfires. Reducing the number of trees or managing vegetation concentrations near the building may decrease fuel continuity and potential fire exposure. Addressing vegetation directly adjacent to access routes can support improved access for firefighters and potentially aid suppression efforts. Expanding open space or maintaining existing clear areas along the perimeter could reduce opportunities for fire spread and enhance long-term property preparedness. Thoughtful management of these elements, focusing on reducing vegetation densities near critical areas, may improve both immediate and long-term wildfire resilience.
